message:
test(demo_showcase): comprehensive filtering engine unit tests (bd-3eru)

Add edge case tests for Jobs/Logs/Docs filtering engines:
- Empty query handling
- Unicode input (Japanese, emoji)
- Very long queries (10K characters)
- Whitespace-only input
- Newline/paste-like input
- Case insensitivity verification
- Filter idempotence
- Sorting stability (Jobs)
- Combined filter composition (Jobs)
- Search navigation boundaries (Docs)
- Special characters in search (Docs)

All tests are deterministic and run fast.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
